html:
Exclusive to:

The Mast is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, and introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Seafaring Filter, requires 3 Boards, 3 Ropes and 8 Silk to craft, and a Think Tank to prototype.

The Mast item can be deployed on a Boat. The Mast's sail can then be lowered to allow the players to sail the Boat. A Steering Wheel can be used to direct the Mast's rotation.

Masts can be upgraded with a Deck Illuminator to emit light, or with a Lightning Conductor to protect from Lightning.

To raise the sail efficiently, the player should hover their mouse over the Mast with an open sail and wait for the text to say "Heave!". Clicking on the Mast at this time will have the character raise the Mast halfway. The text will change to "Ho!", and once the player clicks the Mast again, the sail will be closed completely. If the player clicks the Mast before or after these text prompts, the character will struggle and it will take longer to close the sail. This applies to the Winged Sail as well.

Winged Sail

The Winged Sail is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Seafaring filter, and requires 3 Driftwood Piece, 3 Ropes and 4 Feathery Canvas to craft. It is prototyped at the Think Tank.

The Winged Sail item can be deployed on a Boat. Its sail can then be raised to allow players to sail the Boat. Winged Sails take more time to be deployed than normal Masts, but they can be retracted much faster, allowing the boat to stop more easily. Winged Sails apply a stronger force than normal Masts, but turn at the same speed.

Winged Sails can be upgraded with a Deck Illuminator or a Lightning Conductor.

Physics

An open Mast increases the maximum velocity of a Boat by 2.5, and an open Winged Sail increases the speed by 4. Each other successive mast is 30% less effective than the previous (Winged Sail effects apply first). The final maximum speed is bounded between 1 (without mast) and 10. The following table gives some examples:

Mast(s) None
Speed None 2.5 4.25 4 5.475 5.75 6.8 8.76 10

Note that the base speed is 0, which is raised to 1 by the bound.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Mast Skins

  • The Timeless Roseate Sail skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together between August 15, 2019, the release day of the Turn of Tides update, and August 29, 2019. As of March 24, 2022, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei Points.
  • The Timeless Crab King Sail skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together between April 23, 2020, the release day of the She Sells Sea Shells update, and May 28, 2020. As of March 24, 2022, the Loyal version of this skin was available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei Points.
  • The Loyal Rockjaw Sail skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from June 24, 2021 to July 8, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
Woven - Elegant
Swashbuckler Collection
Makeshift Mast
A mast made from the remnants of defeated ships (and possibly some of their crew).
Timeless / Loyal
Crab King Sail
Let your boat boast your victory over a colossal crustacean.
Loyal
Nautical Collection
Rockjaw Sail
Brave the open sea with the stone-faced resilience of a fearsome Rockjaw.
Timeless / Loyal
Rose Collection
Roseate Sail
This striking sail comes adorned with a rose crest.

Winged Sail Skins

  • The Proof of Purchase Arc Welded Mast skin is obtained by purchasing the Nendoroid Wilson Figure.
Woven - Elegant
Wagstaff Collection
Scrap Metal Mast
An impressive feat of engineering, cobbled together by an industrious mind.
Proof of Purchase
Arc Welded Mast
Don't worry, it's made of a lightning-proof type of metal...

Trivia

  • The Mast was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • The Winged Sail was introduced in the Salty Dog beta update.
  • The blueprint requirement for the Winged Sail was replaced with prototyping in the March 2022 QoL update.

Gallery

  • Mast Closed
  • Mast Burnt
  • Makeshift Mast Built
  • Makeshift Mast Build Broken
  • Makeshift Mast Build Closed
  • Makeshift Mast Burnt
  • Winged Sail Closed
  • Winged Sail Burnt

"mast_item"
“Now I can build a mast.”
–Wilson, Examining a Mast Kit.
“You can't call it "sailing" if you don't have a sail.”
–Willow, Examining a Mast Kit.
“Is for making big sail-stick.”
–Wolfgang, Examining a Mast Kit.
“It's for making a mast.”
–Wendy, Examining a Mast Kit.
“FOR BUILDING A HATEFUL MAST”
–WX-78, Examining a Mast Kit.
“A tool for harnessing the wind's power.”
–Wickerbottom, Examining a Mast Kit.
“Better build it if we don't wanna row all day.”
–Woodie, Examining a Mast Kit.
“Do I look like a shipyard laborer?”
–Maxwell, Examining a Mast Kit.
“Tö harness the winds upön mine vessel!”
–Wigfrid, Examining a Mast Kit.
“That's for building a mast.”
–Webber, Examining a Mast Kit.
“An important ingredient for any sailboat.”
–Warly, Examining a Mast Kit.
“Hello! Helping, Friend?”
–Wormwood, Examining a Mast Kit.
“I can't wait to build that. I love hoisting things.”
–Winona, Examining a Mast Kit.
“A mast to sail the ocean vast.”
–Wortox, Examining a Mast Kit.
“Pieces for boat thing.”
–Wurt, Examining a Mast Kit.
“A mast would be useful.”
–Walter, Examining a Mast Kit.
“That'll be the... sail holder bit.”
–Wanda, Examining a Mast Kit.

“Spread my wings and sail away!”
–Wilson, Examining a Winged Sail.
“Just think how much cooler it'd look if I set it on fire.”
–Willow, Examining a Winged Sail.
“Bird make good sail.”
–Wolfgang, Examining a Winged Sail.
“Fly me away from this place.”
–Wendy, Examining a Winged Sail.
“YOU WORK FOR ME NOW”
–WX-78, Examining a Winged Sail.
“What an impressive wingspan.”
–Wickerbottom, Examining a Winged Sail.
“I don't like the look of it.”
–Woodie, Examining a Winged Sail.
“A warning to any waterfowl that cross us.”
–Maxwell, Examining a Winged Sail.
“Let us be off, with the speed of the Valkyrie!”
–Wigfrid, Examining a Winged Sail.
“Our boat looks ready to fly away!”
–Webber, Examining a Winged Sail.
“It looks nice, non?”
–Warly, Examining a Winged Sail.
“Came from Tweeter”
–Wormwood, Examining a Winged Sail.
“A bit showy, but useful.”
–Winona, Examining a Winged Sail.
“It fought to no avail, and became our sail!”
–Wortox, Examining a Winged Sail.
“Birdy sail!”
–Wurt, Examining a Winged Sail.
“We'd better get this set up, Woby.”
–Walter, Examining a Winged Sail.
“I can finally get this old boat up to speed!”
–Wanda, Examining a Winged Sail.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cột buồm là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc đi biển, cần 3 Ván ép, 3 Dây thừng và 8 Tơ để chế tạo và Think Tank để tạo nguyên mẫu.
